insights: The market is currently exhibiting mean-reversion behavior, hovering consistently around the 1350-job mark despite short-term volatility.
Data-centric roles (Data Engineering and ML) are showing resilience and slight growth, suggesting firms are prioritizing AI-readiness over general infrastructure scaling.
The decline in FAANG+ and SRE roles indicates a tightening of specialized headcount, while Unicorns remain the primary stabilizers of the new graduate job market.
